---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Keepra
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem this solves

A clear description of the problem or workflow gap. Example: "I always have to open three separate apps to..."

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you've thought about.

## Which tool(s) does this affect?

- [ ] Links
- [ ] Vault
- [ ] Notes
- [ ] Tasks
- [ ] Contacts
- [ ] Drive
- [ ] Dashboard
- [ ] Sync / account
- [ ] MCP / AI integration
- [ ] Other: ___

## Platform

- [ ] All platforms
- [ ] Web only
- [ ] Desktop only
- [ ] Mobile only

## Additional context

Mockups, screenshots from other apps, or any other context that helps explain the request.
